channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Southern Guild Opens New York Gallery to Showcase Contemporary African Art
item.description: Cape Town-based Southern Guild has opened a permanent gallery in New York's Tribeca district, marking a significant expansion and an important moment for contemporary African art on the global stage. ...

item.title: Academic Critique of J.K. Rowling's Views on Gender and Transphobia
item.description: Two Australian academics have published an article in the journal 'Celebrity Studies,' claiming that J.K. Rowling has transitioned from a global literary icon to embodying the divisive villain she onc...

item.title: Equity Bank Leads 2026 Banking Awards as James Mwangi Wins CEO Honour
item.description: Equity Bank has once again stamped its authority in Kenya’s banking sector after emerging as the Overall Best Bank at the 22nd Annual Think Business Banking Awards 2026. The bank delivered a standout ...

item.title: Bulls secure crucial URC points with win over Scarlets on final overseas tour
item.description: The Bulls ended their final United Rugby Championship (URC) overseas tour with a tight 23–21 victory over the Scarlets, returning to South Africa in a strong position for the play-offs. Flyhalf Handré...

item.title: Trump Comments On Assassination Attempt, Reflects On Impact And Country Changes
item.description: US President Donald Trump, wey survive one assassination attempt for 2024 election rally, yan say e don study assassinations well well. On Saturday, one shooter rush media gala for Washington, but Tru...

item.title: Adjoa Andoh Discusses Shakespeare, Identity in Theatre, and Diversity in Entertainment
item.description: Adjoa Andoh, celebrated actor and director, recently participated in the Folger Shakespeare Library's director’s residency programme in Washington DC. In an interview, Andoh discussed her work in Shak...

item.title: Foreign Minister Penny Wong visits North Asia to strengthen fuel supply security
item.description: Foreign Minister Penny Wong is set to visit Japan, China, and South Korea this week as part of the Albanese government's efforts to secure Australia’s energy and fuel supplies amid global disruptions....

item.title: PM Modi Highlights Efforts to Save the Great Indian Bustard
item.description: In his 133rd episode of Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Narendra Modi discussed the ongoing conservation efforts for the critically endangered Great Indian Bustard (GIB). The bird, which was once on the ...

item.title: Smith shines as Converge secures strong win over Phoenix in PBA game
item.description: In the latest PBA Commissioner’s Cup game, Converge continued to assert their dominance as they faced an import-less Phoenix squad. Donovan Smith spearheaded the effort, showcasing impressive scoring ...

item.title: NTA Urges NEET UG 2026 Aspirants to Ensure Aadhaar Biometric Details Are Updated
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has issued an advisory for candidates preparing for NEET UG 2026, urging them to update their Aadhaar biometric details well in advance of the examination process. Th...

item.title: Jesus Is Lord Church Prevails in Hong Kong Property Case
item.description: Batay sa ibinigay na teksto, kulang ang detalye ng aktwal na balita at mukhang headline at site footer lamang ang nakuha. Gayunpaman, mula sa pamagat, malinaw na ang Jesus Is Lord (JIL) Church ay nana...

item.title: US Government Expands AI-Based Surveillance Programs, Raising Privacy Concerns
item.description: Privacy and technology law expert Anne Toomey McKenna has raised concerns about the U.S. government's growing investment in AI-driven surveillance technologies. She points out that the government is i...

item.title: Suspect identified after security incident at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Cole Tomas Allen has been identified by authorities as the suspect involved in a serious security incident during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, a high-profile annual event attended by politi...

item.title: Supreme Court clarifies limits of authority on anticipatory bail and surrender
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has clarified that while a court has the authority to reject an application for anticipatory bail, it does not possess the jurisdiction to direct the accused to surrender be...

item.title: Profile of Cole Tomas Allen, Suspected Attacker at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old man from Torrance, California, has been arrested in connection with the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Online profiles indicate Allen is a highly e...

item.title: Sokoto East Senator Ibrahim Lamido Leaves APC Over Internal Party Conflicts
item.description: Ibrahim Lamido, the senator representing Sokoto East Senatorial District, don officially resign from the All Progressives Congress (APC). According to a letter wey e write on 22 April to the APC ward ...

item.title: U.S. GDP Growth Outpaces UK, EU, and Canada Due to Freer Markets
item.description: An opinion piece by J.D. Tuccille highlights how the United States is outpacing Britain, Europe, and Canada in economic prosperity despite policy challenges elsewhere. Drawing on data from the UK's In...

item.title: KZN Community Mourns Seven Family Members in State-Funded Funeral After Tragic Incident
item.description: A somber atmosphere descended upon the Stanger community in KwaZulu-Natal on Sunday as hundreds gathered for a mass funeral to commemorate seven family members who tragically lost their lives. The dec...

item.title: Concerns raised over Iranian embassy promoting wartime volunteer campaign to minors in Australia
item.description: A wartime volunteer campaign linked to Iran and promoted by its embassy in Canberra has sparked strong concern among Iranian Australians and national security observers. The initiative, known as ‘Janf...

item.title: London Marathon 2026: Tigst Assefa and Sabastian Sawe defend their titles in thrilling race
item.description: The 2026 London Marathon has captivated audiences as the world’s best athletes battle it out on the iconic course. Defending champions Sabastian Sawe and Tigst Assefa returned to London in a bid to ke...
